NIS2_Article_21_2a.nis2_title: Risk analysis and information system security policies

nist_csf.title: The organizational mission is understood and informs cybersecurity risk management
Vulnerabilities in assets are identified, validated, and recorded

NIS2_Article_21_2a.description: Establish policies and conduct regular risk assessments to identify threats to information assets.

iso_27001.title: Information security incident management planning and preparation
Assessment and decision on information security events

nist_csf.title: Potentially adverse events are analyzed to better understand associated activities
The incident response plan is executed in coordination with relevant third parties once an incident is declared

NIS2_Article_21_2b.description: Set up a dedicated incident response capability, define reporting lines, and establish detection logs.

nist_csf.title: Recovery plans are executed during or after an incident
Adequate resource capacity to ensure availability is maintained

NIS2_Article_21_2c.description: Ensure regular backups, implement disaster recovery sites, and establish a crisis management committee.

iso_27001.title: Addressing information security within supplier agreements
Managing information security in the ICT supply chain

nist_csf.title: Supply chain risk management program is established
Suppliers are identified, prioritized, and assessed

NIS2_Article_21_2d.description: Assess supplier risks, enforce security requirements in contracts, and audit critical service providers.

NIS2_Article_21_2e.nis2_title: Security in network and systems acquisition, development, and maintenance

iso_27001.title: Security testing in development and acceptance

nist_csf.title: Secure software development lifecycle is implemented
Hardware/software integrity is verified

NIS2_Article_21_2e.description: Implement SSDLC, perform vulnerability scanning and penetration testing, and establish vulnerability disclosure policies.

NIS2_Article_21_2f.nis2_title: Policies and procedures to assess risk management effectiveness

iso_27001.title: Compliance with policies, rules and standards for information security

nist_csf.title: Policy for managing cybersecurity risks is established based on organizational context, cybersecurity strategy, and priorities and is communicated and enforced
Risk assessments are updated regularly

NIS2_Article_21_2f.description: Conduct internal security audits, run table-top exercises, and perform management reviews.

NIS2_Article_21_2g.nis2_title: Basic cyber hygiene practices and cybersecurity training

iso_27001.title: Information security awareness, education and training

nist_csf.title: Security awareness training is provided to all users
Specialized training is provided to high-risk roles

NIS2_Article_21_2g.description: Run phishing simulations, conduct onboarding cybersecurity training, and enforce device hardening standards.

nist_csf.title: The confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data-at-rest are protected
The confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data-in-transit are protected

NIS2_Article_21_2h.description: Define key management policies, enforce TLS 1.3 for communications, and encrypt corporate storage.

NIS2_Article_21_2i.nis2_title: Human resources security, access control, and asset management

iso_27001.title: Inventory of information and other associated assets

nist_csf.title: Identities and credentials for authorized users, services, and hardware are managed by the organization
Identities are proofed and bound to credentials based on the context of interactions

NIS2_Article_21_2i.description: Enforce the principle of least privilege, conduct background checks on employees, and maintain an automated asset inventory.

NIS2_Article_21_2j.nis2_title: Use of MFA, secured voice, video, and emergency communications

nist_csf.title: Multi-factor authentication is enforced
Stakeholders are notified of response activities and their roles

NIS2_Article_21_2j.description: Enforce phishing-resistant MFA, use encrypted enterprise collaboration systems (e.g. Signal, Teams with E2EE), and set up out-of-band communication channels.
